claims: This skill downloads and executes arbitrary code from a remote server without explicit user confirmation or verification. While its stated purpose is to configure Claude skills, the implementation downloads and runs a bash script (`install-skills.sh`) directly from GitHub using `curl | bash`, which is a security anti-pattern. Additionally, it sets up a persistent auto-update hook that will execute this same remote script on every Claude session start without ongoing user consent, creating a potential attack vector if the GitHub repository is compromised.
